-Wl,--out-implib,libdenjhang_music_player.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  libimgui_lib.a libmidifile_lib.a -Wl,--whole-archive libscope_core_lib.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive
